productTitle: MikroTik Chateau LTE7 Router – Dual Band WiFi, LTE Cat7 High Speed
name: MikroTik Chateau LTE7
title: MikroTik Chateau LTE7
title_extended: MikroTik Chateau LTE7 Router – Dual Band WiFi, LTE Cat7 High Speed
short_description: High-performance home and office router with quad-core IPQ-4019 CPU, 256 MB RAM, LTE Cat7 modem (300 Mbps down / 100 Mbps up), dual-band Wi-Fi (2.4 GHz 802.11b/g/n, 5 GHz 802.11a/n/ac), 5x Gigabit Ethernet, USB 2.0 Type-A, RouterOS v7 L4.
description: High-performance home and office router with quad-core IPQ-4019 CPU, 256 MB RAM, LTE Cat7 modem (300 Mbps down / 100 Mbps up), dual-band Wi-Fi (2.4 GHz 802.11b/g/n, 5 GHz 802.11a/n/ac), 5x Gigabit Ethernet, USB 2.0 Type-A, RouterOS v7 L4.

detailed_description.heading: LTE Performance
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik Chateau LTE7 is a high-performance home and office router that combines elegant design with powerful hardware. Equipped with a quad-core IPQ-4019 CPU (448–896 MHz) and 256 MB DDR3L RAM, it easily handles demanding networking, security, and management tasks. The integrated R11e-LTE7 modem (LTE Category 7) delivers download speeds up to 300 Mbps and upload speeds up to 100 Mbps, offering fast, stable internet even in areas with weaker signals. Dual-band Wi-Fi provides simultaneous 2.4 GHz 802.11b/g/n and 5 GHz 802.11a/n/ac connectivity, supported by high-gain internal antennas (2 dBi / 4 dBi). With five Gigabit Ethernet ports and a USB 2.0 Type-A port, Chateau LTE7 supports versatile wired and wireless configurations. Its modern, compact housing suits both professional and domestic environments, providing reliable connectivity for VPN access, remote work, and entertainment. Designed to deliver enterprise-grade stability with consumer-friendly simplicity, it’s a true balance of performance and aesthetics.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced LTE Connectivity
detailed_description.text: Built on a Category 7 LTE platform, the Chateau LTE7 features 2×2 MIMO DL and carrier aggregation, allowing it to combine multiple LTE bands for higher throughput and lower latency. This technology enhances performance in dense urban areas and significantly improves signal quality in rural environments. Featuring broad-band support for LTE FDD (1, 3, 5, 7, 8, 20, 28) and TDD frequencies (38, 40, 41), the Chateau LTE7 connects seamlessly to most mobile operators throughout Europe and other global regions. For backward compatibility, it also supports 3G R8 connections (up to 42.2 Mbps DL / 5.76 Mbps UL) across bands 1, 3, 5, and 8. Thanks to these extensive radio capabilities, users can maintain a stable broadband link in variable signal conditions. Whether used as a primary internet source or backup connection, the LTE7 modem offers robust, always-on connectivity suitable for both homes and small businesses relying on mobile broadband access.

detailed_description.heading: RouterOS Reliability
detailed_description.text: The Chateau LTE7 operates on RouterOS v7 (License Level 4), MikroTik’s advanced networking platform offering comprehensive configuration options and robust security management. From VPN setup and VLAN management to traffic shaping and advanced firewall rules, RouterOS v7 allows the router to adapt to virtually any networking scenario. The device supports flexible power input via 12–28 V DC jack, with a maximum consumption of 21 W, ensuring energy-efficient performance. Its wide operating temperature range (-40 °C to +70 °C) guarantees reliability in diverse environments. Each unit ships with a 24 V 1.2 A power adapter and a 1.5 m UTP flat cable for immediate installation. Combining LTE versatility, gigabit-class hardware, and RouterOS intelligence, the Chateau LTE7 delivers professional-grade networking in a single, stylish device — ideal for users seeking consistent high-speed connectivity and total administrative control without additional subscriptions or hidden costs.
